old_claim.note: Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) is a plausible dependency for a forecast technology and should be treated as speculative.

new_claim_absent: No direct Metaverse Deep Immersion to BCI edge remains because policy and standards sources describe virtual worlds through XR, HCI, network, AI, haptics, and platform interoperability rather than requiring brain-computer interfaces.

source_shape.source_locator: The European Commission Rolling Plan defines virtual worlds through 3D/XR, network, computing, AI, HCI, haptics, media, and interoperability building blocks, while its human-interface section focuses on screens, sound, keyboards, voice, motion, spatial computing, and VR/AR devices.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source-backed virtual-world stack is based on XR and human-computer interfaces, not BCI as a required input channel.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: BCI may become an optional access modality or a separate neural-interface forecast, but keeping it as a direct prerequisite overstates the broad metaverse node and leaks the full-sensory BCI variant into all dependents.

ontology_before: The graph made broad deep-immersion metaverse systems depend on brain-computer interfaces.
ontology_after: The graph keeps metaverse deep immersion tied to XR, AI, internet platforms, haptics, and human-computer interfaces while leaving BCI as a separate optional or downstream modality.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: direct metaverse_deep_immersion -> brain_computer_interface edge removed and locked absent in 2026-06-24-metaverse-deep-immersion-scope.json.
would_reject_if: The node is later rescoped specifically to full-sensory neural metaverse access rather than immersive virtual worlds broadly.
A source shows brain-computer interfaces are required for virtual worlds rather than optional advanced interfaces.
A downstream node represents neural-metaverse interaction and should point separately to both metaverse_deep_immersion and brain_computer_interface.
short_reason: BCI is optional neural-interface scope, not a source-backed prerequisite for virtual-world metaverse systems.
